mnemonics: Mother Never Gets Pizzas On Tuesdays
Most Nachos Have Plenty Of Toppings Often
keyPoints: Commutative Law: a ∨ b = b ∨ a
Associative Law: (a ∨ b) ∨ c = a ∨ (b ∨ c)
Distributive Law: a ∧ (b ∨ c) = (a ∧ b) ∨ (a ∧ c)
Identity Law: a ∨ 0 = a and a ∧ 1 = a
Annihilation Law: a ∧ 1 = a and a ∨ 0 = a
